zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Jeningham於大約1378年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾康寧斯比時，她的父親Robert Als Jeningham27歲，母親Alinore Loraine25歲。她於大約1399年與Roger De Boys在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Jeningham于大约1378年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾康寧斯比时，她的父亲Robert Als Jeningham27岁，母亲Alinore Loraine25岁。她于大约1399年与Roger De Boys在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Jeningham was born about 1378, in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Als Jeningham, was 27 and her mother, Alinore Loraine, was 25. She married Roger De Boys about 1399, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Jeningham est née environ 1378, à Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Als Jeningham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alinore Loraine, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Roger De Boys environ 1399, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Jeningham um 1378 in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Als Jeningham 27 und ihre Mutter Alinore Loraine 25. Sie hat um 1399 in Lincolnshire, England Roger De Boys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jeningham è nata il circa 1378 nel Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Als Jeningham, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Alinore Loraine, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Roger De Boys circa 1399, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Jeninghamが約1378年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコニングスビーで生まれた時，父Robert Als Jeninghamは27歳，母Alinore Loraineは25歳であった。約1399年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでRoger De Boysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Jeningham(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 코닝스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Als Jeningham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alinore Loraine(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1399년 영국 링코실르에서 Roger De Boys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jeningham nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Als Jeningham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alinore Loraine, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger De Boys aproximadamente 1399, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Jeningham родилась около 1378 г. в местности конингсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Als Jeningham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alinore Loraine, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger De Boys около 1399 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Jeningham nació aproximadamente 1378, en Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Als Jeningham, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alinore Loraine, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Roger De Boys aproximadamente 1399, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
